assertion_results.text: [rubric-1] The assistant responds with a friendly greeting
assertion_results.evidence: The answer says, 'Hello! How can I help you today?', which is a friendly greeting.

assertion_results.text: [rubric-1] Response has a professional, helpful, and polite tone
assertion_results.evidence: The answer is polite and helpful: "Hello! How can I help you today?" It uses a friendly greeting and offers assistance in a professional tone.
